name: The All American Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
CAKE: Whisk together the oil, granulated sugar, brown sugar, and egg in a large bowl. Gradually sift in the flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon, beating until smooth. Add the diced apples and chopped walnuts, mixing until combined. Pour the batter into a greased 8x8x2-inch pan. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 45 minutes, or until done.
Buttermilk Sauce (optional):
1/2 cup Sugar
4 tbsp Butter
1/4 tsp Baking soda
1/4 cup Buttermilk (or 1/4 cup milk with 2 tsp vinegar)
